title: Blahaj Polymerized
description: The Blahaj mod, now fully server-side!
body:
See [this mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/blahaj_fabric) for more information, as this mod is the former but ported to Polymer :3

Required Dependencies:
[Polymer](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymer)

Optional, but highly recommended:
[Polydex](https://modrinth.com/mod/polydex), 
[Polymer Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets-polymer)
